function.name: get_7_day_weather_forecast
function.description: Get a 7-day weather forecast for a city.
function.long_description: Retrieves a 7-day weather forecast including temperature ranges, sun hours, and daily weather conditions for a specified city using an external weather API.

city.description: Name of the city to get the weather forecast for

example_user_queries: Show the 7-day weather forecast for Bengaluru.
What is the weekly forecast for New York?
Give me the next 7 days of weather for London.
Show this week’s weather outlook for Sydney.
What does the weather look like over the next week in Toronto?
Give me the weekly weather forecast for Singapore.
Fetch forecast data for the next 7 days in San Diego.
Show the 7-day weather forecast using city Paris.
